name: FS KKR Capital Corp
summary: . Summary FS KKR Capital Corp. (NYSE: FSK), or the Company, which may also be referred to as we, us or our, was incorporated under the general corporation laws of the State of Maryland on December21, 2007 and formally commenced investment operations on January2, 2009. We are an externally managed, non-diversified, closed-end management investment company that has elected to be regulated as a business development company, or BDC, under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended, or the 1940 A...
